assignments.name: ambiguity_summary
assignments.value: ={{ 'The submitted document \'' + $json.normalized_specs[0].title + '\' contains insufficient content for a full ambiguity diagnostic. The document has approximately ' + $json.normalized_specs[0]._debug_word_count + ' words, which is below the minimum threshold required for reliable pattern detection. A meaningful spec ambiguity analysis requires at minimum 150 words covering the core requirements, scope, and expected outcomes.' }}

assignments.name: recommended_clarifications
assignments.value: ={{ ['Expand the document to at least 150 words covering: the core problem being solved, the requirements or acceptance criteria, the scope boundaries (what is and is not included), and any dependencies or open questions.'] }}

assignments.name: recommended_next_step
assignments.value: Return this document to the author for expansion before requesting analysis — the current content is insufficient for a reliable diagnostic.

assignments.name: review_reason
assignments.value: Document has insufficient content for automated analysis. Human review is required to determine whether this is a draft-in-progress or a complete but inadequate specification.
